name: tableau-sql-updater
description: Edit and validate Tableau datasource Custom SQL / Initial SQL without Tableau Desktop.

tableau_token_name_cars.title: Tableau PAT name (cars site)
tableau_token_name_cars.description: Personal Access Token name for the cars site (Tableau Online → My Account Settings → Personal Access Tokens)

tableau_token_secret_cars.title: Tableau PAT secret (cars site)
tableau_token_secret_cars.description: Personal Access Token secret for the cars site

tableau_token_name_dealertools.title: Tableau PAT name (dealertools site)
tableau_token_name_dealertools.description: Personal Access Token name for the dealertools site

tableau_token_secret_dealertools.title: Tableau PAT secret (dealertools site)
tableau_token_secret_dealertools.description: Personal Access Token secret for the dealertools site

redshift_user.title: Redshift username
redshift_user.description: Redshift username embedded into the .tdsx for connection auth

redshift_password.title: Redshift password
redshift_password.description: Redshift password embedded into the .tdsx for connection auth
